quoteDescription: PO416 - 20ml Paint Blend Metallic Silver - 36x80mm Complex
lineDescription: || ||PO416 - 20ml Paint Blend Metallic Silver - 36x80mm Complex||Size: 36mm x 80mm||Material: PP Metallic Silver||Print Colour: White + 6 Colour||Tool: D0892(3,7)(3,2)0.6mm Complex||Provided on 76mm Cores||Finishing: GLOSS VARNISH||MACHINE APPLIED||Supply: Rolls of 5,000||Qty: 70,000||10000 x Imperial - PANTONE 2313 C||10000 x Glamour - PANTONE 7508 C||10000 x 24 Karat - PANTONE 149 C||5000 x Butter - PANTONE 2009 C||5000 x Sterling - NO BACKGROUND (SILVER STOCK)||5000 x Gun Metal - PANTONE 430 C||5000 x Charcoal - PANTONE 426 C||5000 x Rose Gold - PANTONE 2338 C||5000 x Porcelain - WHITE||5000 x Bronze - PANTONE 2435 C||5000 x Champagne - PANTONE 3596 C||Group discount applied (PO415/416/425)||
deliveryToAddress: Temper Group ||47 Hargraves Avenue ||Albion Park Rail NSW 2527
